summary: The diff implements most of the required performance improvements. REQ-32 (preconnect + async fonts + noscript), REQ-34 (lazy loading on service/about images), REQ-35 (preload hero image), REQ-36 (inlined critical CSS), and REQ-37 (lang='fr', dns-prefetch) are all evidenced. REQ-33 (Hero.tsx eager loading with fetchpriority='high') is mentioned in the file summary for Hero.tsx but the actual Hero.tsx diff is not shown. REQ-37's Cache-Control meta tag is not evidenced anywhere in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add <meta http-equiv='Cache-Control' content='max-age=31536000, immutable' /> for static assets
missing_requirements.reason: The index.html diff and the frontend-file-summaries.txt description of index.html do not mention a Cache-Control meta http-equiv tag being added. Only dns-prefetch and lang='fr' are described.

hallucinated_features.description: Added decoding='async' attribute to service card images and the about section image
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only required loading='lazy' for below-the-fold images (REQ-34). The diff summary explicitly mentions decoding='async' was also added to Services.tsx and About.tsx, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Fixed Google Structured Data microdata by adding itemReviewed property to Testimonials.tsx review articles
hallucinated_features.reason: This change to Testimonials.tsx is described in frontend-file-summaries.txt but was not part of the performance build request. The non-goals explicitly state no changes to testimonials or structured data.
